comment:
After one week of using it, I think this device is absolutely amazing, but the compromises are real, they just may not be what you think they are, still this phone isn't for everyone.


 
This phone definitely isn't for people that want a versatile camera setup, however the single rear camera and the new selfie camera are both great.


 
This phone is also not for gamers, but during regular daily usage, even when using it while hotspotting, it doesn't get hot.


 
Other, than that however, the single speaker is loud and clear, so it's okay for watching videos, but of course for anything more serious, like movies or music, stereo speakers would be ideal, or earphones.


 
The battery life is actually great, even with constant mobile data usage and max brightness, screen on time is easily 5 hours, or more, which should be enough for most people.


 
The biggest compromise in my opinion, is the charging speed of the device, which from near 0% to 100% takes almost 2 hours, despite the small battery.


 
Overall, I don't regret my decision of choosing this device, it's absolutely way better, than it seems like on paper.

After one week of using it, I think this device is absolutely amazing, but the compromises are real, they just may not be what you think they are, still this phone isn't for everyone.

This phone definitely isn't for people that want a versatile camera setup, however the single rear camera and the new selfie camera are both great.

This phone is also not for gamers, but during regular daily usage, even when using it while hotspotting, it doesn't get hot.

Other, than that however, the single speaker is loud and clear, so it's okay for watching videos, but of course for anything more serious, like movies or music, stereo speakers would be ideal, or earphones.

The battery life is actually great, even with constant mobile data usage and max brightness, screen on time is easily 5 hours, or more, which should be enough for most people.

The biggest compromise in my opinion, is the charging speed of the device, which from near 0% to 100% takes almost 2 hours, despite the small battery.

Overall, I don't regret my decision of choosing this device, it's absolutely way better, than it seems like on paper.
